caption:
Late nights are my favorite time to teach 🌙✨

The lecture hall was silent, save for the rhythmic tapping of my heels against the wooden floor. As the Dean's assistant, I had access to the restricted wing of the university library, and tonight, it was just me, the moonlight, and the smell of old paper 📚. I adjusted my silk blouse, feeling the fabric cling to my curves as I walked toward the empty desk in the center of the room. I wasn't just studying; I was performing, even without an audience.

My skirt was tight, hugging my hips, and the blazer tied around my waist let my chest breathe. The top button of my blouse hung open just enough to tease, promising secrets I wasn't ready to reveal yet 💃. I imagined a student staring up at me, wondering if I was as curious as they thought I was about the subject matter or the way my legs crossed beneath the skirt.

The air grew heavier, charged with the electricity of possibility. I leaned back, running my fingers through my hair, feeling the cool breeze of the air conditioner. Every glance at the clock felt like a countdown to something inevitable. I whispered to the shadows, ready to make the night unforgettable.

#UniversityLife #TeacherSecrets #CurvyTeacher #NightStudy #InstaFashion #EuropeanVibes
